title: API Tokens
subtitle: Create personal access tokens for API integrations.

comingSoon.title: Personal API tokens
comingSoon.description: Generate scoped access tokens to integrate Alpis with your tools, scripts, CI pipelines, and third-party services.

scopes.label: Fine-grained scopes
scopes.description: Limit each token to exactly the permissions it needs — tickets:read, users:write, and more.

secure.label: Secure by design
secure.description: Tokens are shown once at creation. Only a hashed prefix is stored — never the secret.

revocation.label: Instant revocation
revocation.description: Revoke any token immediately without affecting other integrations.

lastUsed.label: Last-used tracking
lastUsed.description: See exactly when each token was last used to audit and clean up stale keys.

restAccess.label: Full REST access
restAccess.description: Authenticate any API request — list tickets, update statuses, trigger automations.
